week.name: Unlimited-OCR
week.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
week.features: Unlimited-OCR is a framework designed for one-shot long-horizon document parsing. It leverages advanced recognition capabilities to handle extensive document layouts and complex text structures.
week.applications: It is ideal for automated data extraction and digitization of long-form documents or dense academic papers.

week.name: Cowart
week.features: Cowart is a JavaScript-based project with a focus on web development or utility automation. It provides modular functions for managing dynamic web content or internal logic.
week.applications: It can be used by developers looking for lightweight utilities to enhance web application functionality.

week.name: zhengxi-views
week.description: 可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
week.features: This AI agent acts as a research assistant specialized in the investment methodologies of fund manager Zheng Xi. It combines public opinions, verified investment frameworks, and real-time market data to provide traceable Q&A and fund scoring.
week.applications: Financial analysts and investors can use this to perform research and gain insights into a specific professional's investment logic while maintaining transparency.

week.name: agent-apprenticeship
week.description: The living ecosystem where AI agents learn from real-world work through iterative workflow loops, reusable experience, and collective training signal exchange.
week.features: This platform creates an ecosystem where AI agents learn from real-world workflows through iterative loops. It focuses on sharing collective training signals and reusable experiential data.
week.applications: Developers building intelligent autonomous agents can use this to improve the training and efficiency of their AI systems.

week.name: cnfast
week.features: Cnfast serves as a high-performance, drop-in replacement for common class name utilities. It optimizes the rendering or concatenation of class strings for better speed.
week.applications: Frontend developers working with React or similar frameworks can use this to improve performance when managing complex CSS class dynamics.

week.name: birds.cafe
week.features: Birds.cafe is a web-based project that likely facilitates social interaction or information sharing through a bird-themed interface. It leverages modern web technologies to provide a seamless user experience.
week.applications: It serves as a niche community platform or a specialized social media tool for hobbyists and digital socializers.

week.name: codex-orange-book
week.description: Codex 橙皮书：从安装到实战案例的全链路 Codex 使用指南（非官方开源，含可下载 PDF）
week.features: The Codex Orange Book provides a comprehensive, end-to-end guide for using the Codex programming assistant, covering everything from initial installation to advanced real-world implementation.
week.applications: Software engineers and beginners looking to maximize their productivity with coding assistants can use this as a reference manual.

week.name: Windows-Copilot-API
week.description: Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
week.features: This tool reverses engineers the Windows Copilot interface to provide an OpenAI-compatible REST API. It allows access to advanced models without requiring specific API keys or billing.
week.applications: Developers who want to integrate AI capabilities into their local tools without managing external subscriptions or API costs will find this highly useful.

week.name: junction
week.description: VS Code chat sidebar for local AI coding agents
week.features: Junction integrates a chat sidebar directly into VS Code to manage local AI coding agents. It streamlines the developer experience by keeping conversational AI workflows within the IDE context.
week.applications: Software developers can use it to maintain constant AI support for coding tasks without switching windows or platforms.

week.name: security-audit-skill
week.description: A coding-agent skill for multi-phase security audits with independently verified, machine-readable findings
week.features: This coding-agent skill is designed for multi-phase security auditing. It generates independently verified, machine-readable findings to ensure high accuracy in vulnerability detection.
week.applications: Security researchers and DevOps engineers can automate and standardize their code audit processes to enhance software security.

week.name: Good-Badminton
week.features: This project implements an AI-powered Hawk-Eye system specifically for badminton. It uses computer vision to track shuttlecock movement and player positioning during games.
week.applications: Sports analysts and coaches can use this to track performance data and resolve calls in competitive badminton matches.

week.name: recall
week.description: Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
week.features: Recall provides durable, offline memory for Claude Code, allowing it to remember project details across sessions. It helps developers avoid wasting tokens on redundant context explanations.
week.applications: Engineers working on long-term projects with AI coding assistants can use this to improve efficiency and maintain consistent context.

month.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A self-hosted workspace designed for AI integration. It focuses on providing a private environment to manage and run AI workflows.
month.applications: Ideal for developers and privacy-conscious users who want to manage AI-driven projects locally without relying on third-party cloud services.

month.name: ponytail
month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
month.features: An AI agent optimization tool designed to prioritize efficiency by minimizing code output. It mimics a 'lazy' developer's mindset to avoid over-engineering.
month.applications: Best for developers looking to reduce maintenance overhead and prevent the creation of unnecessary, complex codebases.

month.name: MiMo-Code
month.description: MiMo Code: Where Models and Agents Co-Evolve
month.features: A specialized platform where AI models and autonomous agents interact and evolve simultaneously. It focuses on the synergy between model capabilities and agentic behaviors.
month.applications: Useful for AI researchers and engineers working on co-evolutionary learning and advanced multi-agent systems.

month.name: book
month.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.
month.features: The definitive documentation for Astrid OS, covering its kernel architecture, capsule systems, and host ABI. It also details the system's bus structure and security models.
month.applications: Essential for OS developers and architects who need to understand or contribute to the low-level internals of the Astrid OS platform.

month.name: handbook
month.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.
month.features: A comprehensive guide on the operational procedures for the Astrid OS project. It outlines contribution tiers, RFC processes, and the 'kernel-is-dumb' architectural philosophy.
month.applications: Required reading for open-source contributors and project members looking to understand the collaboration standards and governance of Astrid OS.

month.name: improve
month.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.
month.features: A codebase auditing tool that leverages high-end AI models to generate execution plans. It offloads the implementation of these plans to more cost-effective models.
month.applications: Helps engineering teams optimize AI costs while maintaining high-quality code analysis and refactoring workflows.

month.name: ian-xiaohei-illustrations
month.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill
month.features: A Codex skill for generating hand-drawn style illustrations in a 16:9 aspect ratio. It features specific color accents like red, orange, and blue on white backgrounds.
month.applications: Designed for content creators and editors needing consistent, quirky, hand-drawn visuals for articles or blog posts.

month.name: chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
month.features: A curated reference guide for individuals looking to understand the US stock market from a Chinese perspective. It consolidates market entry information and investment resources.
month.applications: Provides practical guidance for retail investors who want to navigate US equity markets from China.

month.name: PixelRAG
month.description: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search.
month.features: A pixel-native search system that bypasses traditional web parsing methods. It enables direct, visual-based retrieval for scalable information gathering.
month.applications: Used by data scrapers and AI developers to extract information from visually complex websites where standard HTML parsing fails.

month.name: omnigent
month.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.
month.features: An open-source framework that acts as a meta-harness for orchestrating various AI agents like Claude Code and Cursor. It supports policy enforcement, sandboxing, and cross-device collaboration.
month.applications: Ideal for power users who want a unified interface to swap between different AI agents without reconfiguring their entire development environment.

month.name: Unlimited-OCR
month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
month.features: A high-performance OCR system that supports one-shot, long-horizon text parsing. It is optimized to handle extensive document analysis with improved accuracy.
month.applications: Targeted at enterprise-level document processing tasks where long-form text recognition and scalability are critical.

month.name: guizang-social-card-skill
month.description: 🪧 Claude Code / Codex skill — generate Xiaohongshu carousels & WeChat 21:9+1:1 cover pairs. Editorial × Swiss visual systems, 28 layouts, 10 themes, single-file HTML → PNG. 小红书图文 + 公众号封面对

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

month.features: A visual design tool for generating social media assets like Xiaohongshu carousels and WeChat cover pairs. It uses Swiss-style design systems to convert single-file HTML templates into PNG images.

three_months.name: odysseus

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

three_months.name: caveman
three_months.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
three_months.features: A specialized skill for Claude Code that optimizes token usage by simplifying language input. It achieves up to 65% reduction in token consumption by adopting a concise, minimalist communication style.

three_months.name: graphify
three_months.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
three_months.features: An AI coding assistant skill that transforms diverse file types, including code, SQL schemas, and media, into an interconnected, queryable knowledge graph. It unifies app logic, database structure, and documentation into a single searchable dataset.
three_months.applications: Highly beneficial for engineers and architects needing a comprehensive overview of complex codebases and their underlying infrastructure.

three_months.name: open-design
three_months.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.

three_months.applications: Designed for developers building intelligent agents that require persistent, highly-optimized memory storage.

three_months.name: nuwa-skill

three_months.applications: Perfect for power users who prefer a terminal-first workflow and need a reliable, high-performance coding agent for continuous tasks.

year.features: This project provides a specialized CLAUDE.md configuration file curated to address common LLM coding pitfalls. It draws inspiration from Andrej Karpathy's expert observations on AI behavior.

audio_video.name: graphify
audio_video.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
audio_video.features: Graphify converts diverse project assets such as codebases, SQL schemas, and documentation into a queryable knowledge graph. It integrates seamlessly with AI coding assistants to map complex relationships between application code and infrastructure.
audio_video.applications: It is ideal for developers and system architects who need to visualize and query large-scale codebases or infrastructure dependencies.

audio_video.name: open-design
audio_video.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs.
audio_video.features: A local-first, open-source alternative to design platforms featuring a native desktop app with over 259 design skills. It supports multi-platform prototyping and exports to various formats like HTML, PDF, and MP4 while integrating with major AI CLIs.
audio_video.applications: Designers and developers can use this for rapid prototyping, design system management, and AI-assisted creative workflows.

audio_video.name: OpenMontage
audio_video.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

audio_video.features: OpenMontage is an agentic video production system offering 12 distinct pipelines and over 500 agent skills. It effectively transforms standard AI coding assistants into comprehensive, automated video production studios.
audio_video.applications: It serves content creators and automation engineers who want to automate complex video editing and production tasks using AI agents.

audio_video.name: video-use
audio_video.features: Video-use provides specialized capabilities for editing videos directly through coding agents. It leverages programmatic control to manipulate video assets via AI-driven workflows.
audio_video.applications: This is perfect for developers building autonomous video editing tools or those looking to script video production processes.

audio_video.name: palmier-pro
audio_video.description: macOS video editor built for AI
audio_video.features: Palmier Pro is a macOS-native video editor specifically optimized for AI-driven post-production workflows. It focuses on providing a clean interface that integrates tightly with AI-enhanced editing tools.
audio_video.applications: Video editors working on macOS who want to incorporate AI features into their professional workflow will find this highly efficient.

audio_video.name: OmniVoice
audio_video.description: High-Quality Voice Cloning TTS for 600+ Languages
audio_video.features: OmniVoice provides high-quality voice cloning and text-to-speech capabilities supporting over 600 languages. It is designed for robustness, scalability, and linguistic diversity in synthetic speech generation.
audio_video.applications: It is suitable for global applications requiring multilingual voiceover, such as automated dubbing or localized content creation.

audio_video.name: OmniVoice-Studio
audio_video.description: The open-source ElevenLabs alternative for local voice cloning, design, create, dubbing and dictation Desktop App
audio_video.features: An open-source desktop application that serves as an alternative to ElevenLabs for local voice cloning, dubbing, and dictation. It enables complete privacy by handling all voice tasks locally on the user's machine.
audio_video.applications: Ideal for creators and developers who need high-quality voice generation without relying on expensive, cloud-based subscription APIs.

audio_video.name: reclip
audio_video.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.
audio_video.features: Reclip is a lightweight, self-hosted media downloader featuring a clean, responsive web interface. It allows users to easily capture and download videos from a wide variety of websites.
audio_video.applications: Users who want to build a personal offline library of web videos will find this tool easy to deploy and manage.

audio_video.name: MOSS-TTS-Nano
audio_video.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.
audio_video.features: MOSS-TTS-Nano is a highly efficient multilingual speech generation model with only 0.1B parameters. It is designed for real-time inference on CPUs without needing a dedicated GPU.
audio_video.applications: It is perfect for lightweight edge devices, mobile applications, or any project requiring fast, local text-to-speech without heavy hardware requirements.

audio_video.name: html-video
audio_video.description: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.
audio_video.features: This tool enables programmatic video generation by converting HTML, CSS, and data into high-quality MP4 files. It offers pluggable render engines, numerous templates, and AI-generated soundtracks with no per-render fees.
audio_video.applications: Useful for developers who need to generate dynamic video content programmatically or automate the creation of branded video assets.

audio_video.name: MisoTTS
audio_video.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model
audio_video.features: MisoTTS is an 8-billion parameter text-to-speech model built to produce highly emotive and human-like vocal output. It focuses on superior voice quality and expressive range compared to standard TTS engines.
audio_video.applications: This is intended for advanced AI characters, interactive media, or applications requiring deep emotional engagement through speech.

audio_video.name: openless
audio_video.description: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字)
audio_video.features: Openless provides an open-source voice input solution for Windows and macOS that features 'push-to-speak' functionality. It captures speech and automatically inserts AI-polished text directly into any active application at the cursor's location.
audio_video.applications: Professionals and students can use this for rapid, error-free dictation and to streamline their writing process in any software.
